sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36057" key="e)/nskeuos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνσκευ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36057.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a mask on,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔκσκευος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.141</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
